    labelThe Sacrifice: Part 7 (0-0)
    titleThe Sacrifice: Part 7
    majorTypestatic
    descriptionHead back to the warpgate in Sarkinon and give the Helping Hand Foundation a short explanation of the neolitic tribes internal conflicts and the horrific sacrifices made to a local diety.
    maxLvl0
    keyv4_JeeS2M02pOitWXmkLKw
    tableMissionTypes
    mustBeInorderYes
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionThe Helping Hand Foundation: “Err… a population of one? Sacrifices to a dragon? A thousand virgins entering the sky? I think we are better off with someone else in the future. Thank you for trying though.”
    addedBodies["yavY5V5G9EWAUFXH9AjA3Q"]
